title: Histamine-2 antagonists
body_html:
Histamine-2 (H2) antagonists are used in the management of dyspepsia, for example gastritis and gastro-oesophageal reflux disease. There are nowadays used second-line to the more effective proton pump inhibitors.

Examples include:
  • ranitidine

Pharmacology
Histamine-2 (H2) antagonists are used in the management of dyspepsia, for example gastritis and gastro-oesophageal reflux disease. There are nowadays used second-line to the more effective proton pump inhibitors.

Examples include:
  • ranitidine
